name: Cystic Fibrosis Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for cystic fibrosis including all manifestation subtypes. Used as an exclusion criterion in respiratory and pulmonary quality measures (e.g., COPD, asthma medication ratio) where cystic fibrosis may confound measure applicability.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Cystic fibrosis with other intestinal manifestations
